hero.headline: MUJ Online MBA in Finance: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved Super/Dual specialization. 12 spec subjects in Sem 3-4. NAAC A+, NIRF #58.

sections.tldr: MUJ Online MBA in Finance covers capital markets, mergers and acquisitions, taxation, treasury management, and international financial management. NAAC A+, NIRF #58 at Rs 1,53,000 upfront (15% off) or Rs 1,80,000 standard. Super/Dual spec — pair Finance with a second specialization. Coursera Plus at Rs 3,999 (70% off Rs 13,999). Best for finance professionals targeting CFO track, investment banking, or treasury leadership roles.

about.body:
Finance is the flagship MBA specialization for professionals building careers in corporate finance, investment banking, treasury management, and capital markets. The MUJ Online MBA in Finance covers the analytical and strategic depth needed for senior finance roles: portfolio management, mergers and acquisitions analysis, taxation strategy, treasury operations, and international financial management.

A key structural advantage of the MUJ MBA is its Super/Dual specialization model. Finance students can pair this specialization with a second spec — such as Analytics and Data Science (for fintech and data-driven finance roles) or BFSI (for banking sector careers). This dual credentialing is rare at this fee level and is a practical differentiator when applying for cross-functional finance leadership roles.

MUJ also bundles Coursera Plus access at Rs 3,999 (down from Rs 13,999), giving Finance students affordable access to global certifications from Johns Hopkins, University of Michigan, and University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign to supplement the core MBA curriculum.

Manipal University Jaipur Online is NAAC A+ accredited with NIRF #58 University ranking for 2025. EdifyEdu verifies accreditation data independently and does not receive commission from MUJ. Full programme overview at /universities/manipal-university-jaipur-online/mba.

sem3Subjects.name: Strategic Management
sem3Subjects.description: Corporate strategy frameworks, competitive positioning, and strategic decision-making for finance executives.

sem3Subjects.name: Term Paper
sem3Subjects.description: Independent research paper applying finance theory to a real-world business problem.

sem3Subjects.name: Security Analysis and Portfolio Management
sem3Subjects.description: Equity and debt valuation, portfolio construction, and risk-adjusted return measurement.

sem3Subjects.name: Mergers and Acquisitions
sem3Subjects.description: M&A deal structuring, valuation methods, due diligence process, and post-merger integration.

sem3Subjects.name: Taxation Management
sem3Subjects.description: Corporate tax planning, GST impact on business, income tax compliance, and tax optimization strategies.

sem3Subjects.name: Internal Audit and Control
sem3Subjects.description: Audit methodology, internal controls design, risk-based auditing, and ICFR frameworks.

sem4Subjects.name: International Business Management
sem4Subjects.description: Cross-border business strategy, trade agreements, and managing global financial operations.

sem4Subjects.name: Project
sem4Subjects.description: Major dissertation applying finance specialization learning to an original applied business study.

sem4Subjects.name: International Financial Management
sem4Subjects.description: FX risk management, cross-border capital structure, transfer pricing, and multinational treasury.

sem4Subjects.name: Treasury Management
sem4Subjects.description: Liquidity management, cash flow forecasting, working capital optimization, and short-term funding.

sem4Subjects.name: Investment Banking and Financial Services
sem4Subjects.description: Capital markets transactions, IPO process, debt capital markets, and financial advisory services.

sem4Subjects.name: Insurance and Risk Management
sem4Subjects.description: Enterprise risk frameworks, insurance product structures, and risk financing decisions for corporations.

syllabus.note: Semester 1 and 2 subjects are shared across all MUJ Online MBA specializations. Full programme structure at /universities/manipal-university-jaipur-online/mba.

whoHires.body:
Finance MBA graduates from Manipal University Jaipur Online are hired across these industries and roles:

**Industries:** Corporate finance, Investment banking, Financial services, BFSI sector, Manufacturing finance functions

**Entry-level roles:** Financial Analyst, Treasury Analyst, Tax Associate, Equity Research Analyst

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** Finance Manager, Treasury Manager, Investment Analyst, Tax Manager, FP&A Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** CFO, VP Finance, Head of Treasury, Director of Investment Banking, Chief Risk Officer

**Top hiring organisations:** HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, Deloitte India, PricewaterhouseCoopers India, EY India, Bajaj Finserv, Tata Capital

skills.body:
The Finance specialization builds skills that corporate finance, investment banking, and treasury employers test at manager and director levels:

**Technical skills:**
- Portfolio Management: security valuation, portfolio construction, factor-based investing, and performance attribution
- M&A Analysis: target screening, synergy valuation, deal structuring, and LBO modelling
- Tax Planning: corporate tax strategy, GST compliance, deferred tax accounting, and international tax frameworks
- Treasury Operations: cash forecasting, FX hedging, intercompany lending, and liquidity risk management

**Applied skills:**
- Financial Modelling: building 3-statement models, DCF valuations, and scenario analysis for investment decisions
- International Finance: FX exposure management, transfer pricing, and cross-border capital allocation

**Soft skills:** Presenting financial forecasts to CFOs and audit committees, managing relationships with banks and rating agencies, building credibility with non-finance business partners through financial storytelling.

comparisons.body:
Comparing MUJ Online MBA Finance against peers:

**vs Amity Online MBA Finance and Accounting Management:** Amity is NAAC A+ and NIRF #22 University at Rs 2,25,000. MUJ Finance covers investment banking, treasury, and international finance more extensively in its Sem 3-4 subjects. MUJ's Rs 1,53,000 upfront fee is 32% lower than Amity at similar NAAC A+ accreditation. Amity's NIRF #22 is stronger for corporate hiring. For pure CFO-track careers, Amity's accounting depth is competitive. For capital markets and investment banking roles, MUJ's spec is more targeted.

**vs NMIMS Online MBA Financial Management:** NMIMS is NAAC A++ and NIRF Management #24 at Rs 1,96,000-2,20,000. NMIMS Finance covers corporate tax planning and investment banking. NMIMS brand is stronger at Tier 1 investment banks and asset managers. MUJ's Super/Dual specialization, Coursera perk, and lower fee are differentiators. For BFSI sector roles in north and central India, MUJ's Manipal brand is well recognised.

**vs LPU Online MBA Finance:** LPU is NAAC A++ and NIRF ~41 at competitive fees. LPU has strong placement infrastructure in Punjab and Haryana manufacturing belt. MUJ's Super/Dual spec flexibility and Coursera Plus access are advantages LPU does not offer. MUJ NIRF #58 is weaker than LPU overall but both are in a similar employer recognition band for finance roles.

fees.body:
The total program fee for the Manipal University Jaipur Online MBA in Finance can be paid through 2 options:

**Option 1 — Semester-wise payment**: Rs 45,000 per semester, Rs 1,80,000 total across 4 semesters
**Option 2 — Full upfront payment (discounted)**: Rs 1,53,000 one-time (Rs 1,80,000 standard less 15 percent fee concession)

A one-time registration fee of Rs 500 applies at enrolment. MUJ does not charge separate exam fees per attempt, project evaluation fees, or admission processing fees beyond this.

For working professionals, MUJ offers a 24-month zero-cost EMI plan at approximately Rs 7,500 per month on the standard fee (Rs 6,375 per month on the discounted fee) through its NBFC lending partners.

**Scholarships available** (non-stackable — pick one based on eligibility):
- **Divyaang** (persons with disabilities): 20% discount with Divyaang certificate
- **Defence personnel**: 20% discount with Service/IC number
- **Manipal University Jaipur alumni** (UG or PG): 20% discount
- **Government employees**: 10% discount with Govt ID
- **Merit scholarship**: 10% discount for 80%+ marks in 10+2 or bachelor's

**Coursera Plus bundled access** (MUJ differentiator): Enrolled MUJ students get Coursera Plus at Rs 3,999 (standard Rs 13,999 — a 70 percent discount). This includes 10,000+ courses from University of Virginia, University of Michigan, Johns Hopkins, University of California Irvine, and other top global universities.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees and scholarships with Manipal University Jaipur each quarter. Please reconfirm current offers and eligibility with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: The Manipal University Jaipur degree certificate carries the Manipal University Jaipur name, the MBA designation, and identifies the online learning mode per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The Finance specialisation is noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode identification on the certificate is standard for UGC-DEB approved programmes and equivalent in recognition to regular MBA degrees for employment, promotions, and further studies.

reviews.intro: Three verified reviews from MUJ Online MBA Finance alumni. Ratings reflect individual experience.

items.name: Ankit Sharma
items.liked: Mergers and acquisitions module and treasury management content were directly applicable to my corporate finance role
items.disliked: Case studies were mostly US and European examples — more India-specific M&A case studies would be valuable
items.body: I work in the corporate finance team at a mid-size manufacturing company. The M&A valuation and treasury management content gave me frameworks I use weekly. The Coursera Plus access was a genuine bonus — I completed the Financial Markets course from Yale at Rs 3,999 total. The Manipal University Jaipur brand was recognised by our Group CFO as a credible management qualification. Got promoted to Finance Manager 7 months after completing the degree.

items.name: Ritika Agarwal
items.liked: Portfolio management and security analysis content was thorough — useful for my transition to asset management
items.disliked: The LMS had login issues during the first semester. Support resolved them but the initial experience was frustrating
items.body: I chose MUJ Finance over Amity because of the dual specialization option — I paired Finance with Analytics and Data Science for a fintech-oriented profile. The security analysis and investment banking subjects were substantive. The proctored exam process worked well once I upgraded my internet connection. The Manipal brand opened doors at a mutual fund company where I now work as a research analyst.

items.name: Mohit Verma
items.liked: Taxation management subject covered GST and corporate tax planning in useful depth
items.disliked: Career services support was minimal. Job postings on the portal were limited and the counselling was generic rather than finance-specific
items.body: The content quality for taxation and internal audit was strong. The dual specialization with BFSI gave me a broader financial services credential. My main complaint is placement support — the career services cell for online students does not match what campus students get. I found my current role through direct applications. Academically strong but do not join expecting campus-style placement support.

faqs.question: Can I choose dual specialization with the MUJ Online MBA?
faqs.answer: Yes. MUJ Online MBA offers a Super/Dual specialization structure where you can select 2 specializations from the available 13 options. Finance pairs well with Analytics and Data Science (for fintech and data-driven finance), BFSI (for banking and insurance sector focus), or International Business (for treasury roles at MNCs). The dual specialization is included in the standard fee — no additional charge.

faqs.question: Is Coursera Plus access included in the MUJ MBA fee or charged separately?
faqs.answer: Coursera Plus is available to enrolled MUJ students at a special price of Rs 3,999 per year (standard price Rs 13,999 — a 70 percent discount). It is not free but the 70% discount makes it accessible. Coursera Plus gives access to 10,000+ courses from top global universities including University of Michigan, Johns Hopkins, and University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign. Finance students find it particularly useful for CFA prep courses, financial modelling courses, and Excel/Python courses.

faqs.question: What scholarships are available for the MUJ Online MBA in Finance?
faqs.answer: MUJ offers five scholarship categories (non-stackable): 20% discount for Divyaang (persons with disabilities) with Divyaang certificate; 20% for Defence personnel with Service/IC number; 20% for Manipal University Jaipur alumni (UG or PG); 10% for Government employees with Govt ID; 10% merit scholarship for 80%+ marks in 10+2 or bachelor's. Additionally, full upfront payment of the standard fee gets a 15% fee concession, reducing total from Rs 1,80,000 to Rs 1,53,000.

faqs.question: What salary can MUJ Finance MBA graduates expect?
faqs.answer: Finance managers and treasury professionals with 3-5 years of experience and this MBA qualification typically earn Rs 8-16 lakh at mid-size corporates and financial institutions. Investment banking associates and FP&A managers earn Rs 12-22 lakh. CFO roles at mid-size companies pay Rs 25-50 lakh. Outcomes depend on company size, city, and whether the candidate combines the MBA with professional certifications like CA, CFA, or CMA.

faqs.question: Is the MUJ Online MBA Finance recognised for government finance roles?
faqs.answer: Yes, for roles where UGC-DEB online degrees are accepted. MUJ NAAC A+ accreditation and NIRF #58 ranking support recognition for government and PSU finance management roles. Always verify the specific recruitment notification's eligibility criteria — some PSU notifications may require specific degree modes. The degree is WES-recognised for international employment verification.

chooseIf: You are a finance professional targeting CFO track, investment banking, or treasury leadership and want a NAAC A+ MBA at under Rs 1.8 lakh with dual specialization flexibility.
You want Manipal brand recognition with the practical advantage of pairing Finance with Analytics and Data Science or BFSI as a dual credential.
You can benefit from subsidised Coursera Plus access to supplement your MBA with global finance certifications from top international universities.
consider: You need the strongest brand for Tier 1 investment bank interviews — NMIMS Financial Management or an ISB track carries more weight at bulge-bracket banks.
You are on a pure CA or CMA track — professional certifications plus a finance MBA from Amity or NMIMS may be better recognised in accounting-led CFO roles.
You need active campus placement support — MUJ online programme career services are limited compared to campus programmes and you will need to drive your own job search.
